speaker: buyer

args.message: Oh, hello there! This RAV4 sounds lovely. You mentioned it has full service records – that’s wonderful. Are they easy to look through?

text: Oh, hello there! This RAV4 sounds lovely. You mentioned it has full service records – that’s wonderful. Are they easy to look through?

speaker: seller

args.message: Absolutely! They're all neatly organized right here in the glove compartment. I had them all checked out myself last week when the car came in. Everything looked great, regular maintenance like clockwork. This RAV4 has been meticulously cared for, a real cream puff. You won't find a cleaner one, especially with this mileage. Ready for anything you to take on your next adventure!

args.message: That's so reassuring to hear! A cream puff, you say? That's just what I'm looking for. How does it drive? Does it feel smooth on the road?

text: That's so reassuring to hear! A cream puff, you say? That's just what I'm looking for. How does it drive? Does it feel smooth on the road?

speaker: seller

args.message: Smooth as silk! You can really feel the quality engineering in this Toyota. It handles like a dream, whether you're cruising on the highway or navigating city streets. No funny noises, no vibrations, just pure driving pleasure. Honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the factory line. You've got to take it for a spin to truly appreciate it!

speaker: buyer

args.message: That sounds absolutely wonderful! A smooth ride is so important. I'm very interested in this car, it really seems like a perfect fit. I was hoping to stay closer to $25,000 for my budget, though. Is there any wiggle room on the price?

text: That sounds absolutely wonderful! A smooth ride is so important. I'm very interested in this car, it really seems like a perfect fit. I was hoping to stay closer to $25,000 for my budget, though. Is there any wiggle room on the price?

speaker: seller

args.message: I understand wanting to stick to a budget, and I can appreciate that. This RAV4 XLE is truly a gem, and considering its one-owner history, low mileage, and impeccable condition, $27,495 is already an incredible value. I’d be losing money at $25,000. How about we meet in the middle? I can do $27,250 for you right now, and we can get you on the road in this beauty today!

speaker: buyer

args.message: Oh, my goodness, I do wish I could meet you there, but my budget is quite firm at $25,000. It's a lovely car, truly, and I'd be so happy to take it home today at that price.

text: Oh, my goodness, I do wish I could meet you there, but my budget is quite firm at $25,000. It's a lovely car, truly, and I'd be so happy to take it home today at that price.

speaker: seller

args.message: I hear you, I really do. But honestly, at $25,000, I’d be practically giving this RAV4 away. I’ve got over $26,500 into this car already, not to mention the reconditioning. I can’t go that low. Tell you what, I can do $27,000. That’s my absolute bottom dollar. It’s a fantastic deal for a car this nice, and I'd be thrilled to see you drive it off the lot today.

args.reason: Oh dear, I truly appreciate your offer, but my budget simply won't stretch beyond $25,000. It's a beautiful car, and I'm sure someone will be very happy with it, but it's just a bit more than I can spend right now.
